name: Apple Tree
desc: Hardy orchard tree. Requires rich soil.

name: Damson Plum
desc: Tough wind-resistant orchard tree.

name: Hawthorn
desc: Classic hedgerow pioneer.

name: Hazel
desc: Highly productive understory shrub.

name: Forced Rhubarb
desc: Heavy feeder requiring rich compost.

name: Comfrey (Bocking 14)
desc: The ultimate dynamic accumulator.

name: Common Alder
desc: Pioneer canopy. Roots host Frankia bacteria to fix nitrogen whilst pumping water out of heavy clay.

name: Blackcurrant
desc: Hardy northern shrub. Produces tart berries.

name: Broad Bean
desc: Hardy short-lived annual. Perfect pioneer crop to quickly inject nitrogen.

name: Rosemary
desc: Aromatic woody herb. Excellent at repelling pests.

name: White Clover
desc: Spreading living mulch. Suppresses weeds and fixes nitrogen.

name: Wild Garlic
desc: Thrives in damp woodland understories. A delicate bulb.

name: Daikon Radish
desc: Bio-drill. Chop and drop to break clay and aerate soil.

name: Alpine Strawberry
desc: Shade tolerant groundcover producing tiny sweet fruits.

name: Water Mint
desc: Thrives in boggy waterlogged soil. Aromatic.

name: Maincrop Potato
desc: Heavy-yielding staple. Harvesting physically breaks up compacted clay.

name: Winter Cabbage
desc: Tough winter veg. Heavy nitrogen drain requiring strong compost.

name: Autumn Carrot
desc: Classic staple that demands loose soil. Will fork in heavy clay.

name: Lettuce
desc: Quick-cut salad crop for Generation 1.

name: Himalayan Balsam
desc: Highly invasive weed that spreads explosively along waterways.
